zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster於大約1310年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾格洛斯蒙特時，他的父親Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster31歲，母親Maud de Chaworth29歲。他於大約1337年與Isabel de Beaumont在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1352年被列為an intelligent and reflective man, grosmont taught himself to write and was the author of the book livre de seyntz medicines,  he is remembered as one of the founders and early patrons of corpus christi college, cambridge。他去世於1361年3月24日在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特 馮 卡素 維福享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster于大约1310年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾格洛斯蒙特时，他的父亲Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster31岁，母亲Maud de Chaworth29岁。他于大约1337年与Isabel de Beaumont在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1352年被列为an intelligent and reflective man, grosmont taught himself to write and was the author of the book livre de seyntz medicines,  he is remembered as one of the founders and early patrons of corpus christi college, cambridge。他去世于1361年3月24日在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特 馮 卡素 維福享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster was born about 1310, in Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, was 31 and his mother, Maud de Chaworth, was 29. He married Isabel de Beaumont about 1337, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. In 1352, at the age of 43, his occupation is listed as an intelligent and reflective man, grosmont taught himself to write and was the author of the book livre de seyntz medicines,  he is remembered as one of the founders and early patrons of corpus christi college, cambridge. He died on 24 March 1361, in Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster est né environ 1310, à Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Maud de Chaworth, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Beaumont environ 1337, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. En 1352, à l’âge de 43 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est an intelligent and reflective man, grosmont taught himself to write and was the author of the book livre de seyntz medicines,  he is remembered as one of the founders and early patrons of corpus christi college, cambridge. Il est décédé le 24 mars 1361, à Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster um 1310 in Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster 31 und seine Mutter Maud de Chaworth 29. Er hat um 1337 in Lancashire, England Isabel de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. 1352, als er 43 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als an intelligent and reflective man, grosmont taught himself to write and was the author of the book livre de seyntz medicines,  he is remembered as one of the founders and early patrons of corpus christi college, cambridge aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. März 1361 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster è nato il circa 1310 nel Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Galles, il suo padre, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Chaworth, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Beaumont circa 1337, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Nel 1352, all'età di 43 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come an intelligent and reflective man, grosmont taught himself to write and was the author of the book livre de seyntz medicines,  he is remembered as one of the founders and early patrons of corpus christi college, cambridge. Morì il 24 marzo 1361, nel Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancasterが約1310年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアグロスモントで生まれた時，父Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancasterは31歳，母Maud de Chaworthは29歳であった。約1337年にイギリスランカシュアイアでIsabel de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。1352年，43歳の時，職業はan intelligent and reflective man, grosmont taught himself to write and was the author of the book livre de seyntz medicines,  he is remembered as one of the founders and early patrons of corpus christi college, cambridgeと記録されている。彼は1361年3月24日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスター ス カストル ヴィエウで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster(이)가 대략 1310년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 그로스몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Chaworth(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1337년 영국 랭카실르에서 Isabel de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1352년, 43세의 나이로 그의 직업은 an intelligent and reflective man, grosmont taught himself to write and was the author of the book livre de seyntz medicines,  he is remembered as one of the founders and early patrons of corpus christi college, cambridge이었다. 그는 1361년 3월 24일 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 테 카스틀 비w에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Chaworth, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Beaumont aproximadamente 1337, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Em 1352, com 43 anos, sua profissão aparece como an intelligent and reflective man, grosmont taught himself to write and was the author of the book livre de seyntz medicines,  he is remembered as one of the founders and early patrons of corpus christi college, cambridge. Ele faleceu em 24 de março de 1361, em Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster родился около 1310 г. в местности гросмонт, монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Maud de Chaworth, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Beaumont около 1337 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. В 1352 году, в возрасте 43 лет,  он работал по профессии an intelligent and reflective man, grosmont taught himself to write and was the author of the book livre de seyntz medicines,  he is remembered as one of the founders and early patrons of corpus christi college, cambridge. Он умер 24 марта 1361 г. в местности лисестир т кастл вию, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry of Grosmont 1st Duke of Lancaster nació aproximadamente 1310, en Grosmont, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Maud de Chaworth, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Isabel de Beaumont aproximadamente 1337, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. En 1352, a la edad de 43 años, su ocupación registrada era an intelligent and reflective man, grosmont taught himself to write and was the author of the book livre de seyntz medicines,  he is remembered as one of the founders and early patrons of corpus christi college, cambridge. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1361, en Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
